pests.name: Bradysia
pests.solution: Construct a standard cultivation house with insect-resistant netting to prevent insect entry. Maintain proper sanitation in cultivation houses. Use neem water extract, garlic, and neem extract.

pests.name: Cecid Fly
pests.solution: Construct a standard cultivation house with insect-resistant netting to prevent insect entry. Maintain proper sanitation in cultivation houses. Use neem water extract, garlic, and neem extract.

pests.name: Lycid Beetle

pests.name: Mite
pests.solution: Construct a standard cultivation house with insect-resistant netting to prevent insect entry. Maintain proper sanitation in cultivation houses. Use neem water extract, garlic, and neem extract. Use sulfur-containing insecticides for mites.

diseases.name: Trichoderma Spp. Infection
diseases.impact: Green spots can be seen on cultivation bags.
diseases.solution: Use fresh, uncontaminated raw materials. Properly sterilize cultivation bags. Use infection-free, well-grown spawn. Disinfect before inoculation and inoculate in a clean, covered area. Properly manage temperature and humidity during the growth period. Remove and destroy infected cultivation bags.

diseases.name: Aspergillus Niger Infection
diseases.impact: Black spots can be seen on cultivation bags.
diseases.solution: Use fresh, uncontaminated raw materials. Properly sterilize cultivation bags. Use infection-free, well-grown spawn. Disinfect before inoculation and inoculate in a clean, covered area. Properly manage temperature and humidity during the growth period. Remove and destroy infected cultivation bags.

diseases.name: Bacterial Infection
diseases.solution: Apply 10g of readily available chlorine dissolved in 1 liter of water regularly at 3-5 day intervals.
